# signoz_alert (Resource)

A SigNoz alert rule. Top-level fields are typed; the query `condition`, `evaluation`, and `notification_settings` are JSON blobs (export from the SigNoz UI to adapt). Defaults target the v5 / v2alpha1 schema required by SigNoz >= 0.125.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A logs-based alert on the v5 / v2alpha1 schema (SigNoz >= 0.125).
# The threshold references a notification channel by name.
resource "signoz_alert" "high_error_logs" {
  alert      = "High error log volume"
  alert_type = "LOGS_BASED_ALERT"
  severity   = "warning"

  condition = jsonencode({
    compositeQuery = {
      queryType = "builder"
      panelType = "graph"
      queries = [{
        type = "builder_query"
        spec = {
          name         = "A"
          signal       = "logs"
          stepInterval = 0
          aggregations = [{ expression = "count()" }]
          filter       = { expression = "severity_text = 'ERROR'" }
          having       = { expression = "" }
        }
      }]
    }
    selectedQueryName = "A"
    thresholds = {
      kind = "basic"
      spec = [{
        name      = "warning"
        target    = 100
        matchType = "1"
        op        = "1"
        channels  = [signoz_notification_channel.slack.name]
      }]
    }
  })

  evaluation = jsonencode({
    kind = "rolling"
    spec = { evalWindow = "5m0s", frequency = "1m0s" }
  })

  preferred_channels = [signoz_notification_channel.slack.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alert` (String) Alert name.
- `alert_type` (String) One of `METRIC_BASED_ALERT`, `LOGS_BASED_ALERT`, `TRACES_BASED_ALERT`, `EXCEPTIONS_BASED_ALERT`.
- `condition` (String) Query condition as JSON (compositeQuery + thresholds). Compared semantically.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Human-readable description.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the rule is disabled. Defaults to false.
- `eval_window` (String) Evaluation window (e.g. `5m0s`).
- `evaluation` (String) Evaluation block as JSON (v2alpha1+). Compared semantically.
- `frequency` (String) Evaluation frequency (e.g. `1m0s`).
- `labels` (Map of String) Custom labels attached to the alert.
- `notification_settings` (String) Notification settings as JSON (renotify, group_by, use_policy). Compared semantically.
- `preferred_channels` (List of String) Notification channel names the alert routes to.
- `rule_type` (String) Rule engine type: `threshold_rule` (default) or `promql_rule`.
- `schema_version` (String) Alert schema version. Defaults to `v2alpha1`.
- `severity` (String) Severity label (e.g. `info`, `warning`, `critical`).
- `source` (String) Source URL recorded on the rule.
- `version` (String) Alert API version. Defaults to `v5` (required by SigNoz >= 0.125).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Server-assigned alert rule id.
